headline: Oracle's 'Cash Flow Waterfall' Is Coming — Analyst Says Market Is Missing The Obvious
summary: Oracle Corp. is being left behind by a market that simply isn’t doing the math, according to one of Wall Street’s most bullish voices on the stock. Guggenheim Securities senior managing director and software analyst John DiFucci appeared on Yahoo Finance Monday to make his case, calling Oracle “grossly undervalued” and reiterating his $400 price target — the highest on the Street, per Benzinga data. summary: Oracle Corporation (NYSE:ORCL) has expanded its partnership with Google Cloud to introduce enhanced artificial intelligence tools for enterprise data management.
